description_long: This is a DeWALT 20V MAX cordless electric drill, featuring a robust, ergonomic black and yellow plastic body with visible signs of wear and use. The drill has a pistol-grip handle with a textured surface for improved grip, and a large battery pack attached at the base, labeled with the DeWALT branding. The front section houses a metallic chuck with a short, pointed driver bit installed, and the head is reinforced with a metallic casing for durability. Multiple ventilation slots are present on the motor housing to prevent overheating during operation. The drill also features a visible trigger button and a forward/reverse switch above the handle, with various stickers and labels providing operational and safety information.
description: A well-used DeWALT 20V MAX cordless electric drill with a black and yellow body, metallic chuck, and attached battery pack. The drill features a visible trigger, ventilation slots, and a driver bit installed.
description_view_0: Side view showing the DeWALT branding, trigger, battery pack, and metallic chuck with a driver bit.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the back of the handle, battery pack, and the absence of branding or controls.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying additional labels, the battery pack, and the metallic chuck with the driver bit.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the drill bit, chuck, and the top of the battery pack.
